name: Sinofert Holdings Limited
summary: Sinofert Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the production, import and export, distribution, and retail of fertilizer raw materials and finished products primarily in Mainland China and Macao Special Administrative Region. The company operates through Basic Fertilizers, Distribution, and Production segments. It offers nitrogen, phosphate, and potash; compound fertilizers; and monocalcium/dicalcium phosphate. The company also provides technological research and development, and services relating to the fertilizer business and products; trades in pesticides and fertilizers; develops agriculture products; and manufactures and sells textiles and feed stuffs. In addition, it explores for and exploits phosphate mine. The company is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Sinofert Holdings Limited in incorporated in 1994 and is a subsidiary of Sinochem Hong Kong (Group) Company Limited.
